title: The Panorama
content:
"A! fredome is a nobill thing!
    Fredome mayse man to haif liking.
    Fredome all solace to man giffis;
    He levys at ese that frely levys!
    A nobil hart may haif nane ese
    Na ellys nocht that may him plese
    Gyff Fredome failythe."
meaning:
John Greenleaf Whittier's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Panorama"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
